title: Add Subscribers On Form
excerpt: Is there a way to add a Subscriber to an item when someone is filling out a form vs after its submitted?

posts.author: cambkane (Cameron Kane)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to add a Subscriber to an item when someone is filling out a form vs after its submitted?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cameron,

You could do this by adding a people column to your form, so that a person is assigned upon submission or by setting up a recipe to assign a specific person when an item is created.

Could either of these work for you?
